category_sources: source_facts.description says media player based on MPlayer and mplayer2; official mpv manual describes mpv as a media player
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mpv; official site and manual use mpv
docs_sources: Official mpv.io manual is the dedicated documentation surface
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mpv-player/mpv, so repo is returned as null per instruction
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official mpv manual describe broad video, audio, subtitle, and command-line playback support
